Treasure Law
For over four decades, Rolemaster has been the defin-For over four decades, Rolemaster has been the defin-
itive fantasy role-playing game that combines realismitive fantasy role-playing game that combines realism
and depth without sacrificing playability. Rolemasterand depth without sacrificing playability. Rolemaster
Unified is the next evolution drawing upon the bestUnified is the next evolution drawing upon the best
elements of previous editions to create a streamlinedelements of previous editions to create a streamlined
and consistent game. Rolemaster Treasure Law bringsand consistent game. Rolemaster Treasure Law brings
the alchemical arts of item creation and a hoard of lootthe alchemical arts of item creation and a hoard of loot
to Rolemaster Unified.to Rolemaster Unified.
At the heart of Rolemaster Treasure Law is theAt the heart of Rolemaster Treasure Law is the
definitive system for magic item creation. Revised,definitive system for magic item creation. Revised,
reformatted, reorganized and expanded, and fully inte-reformatted, reorganized and expanded, and fully inte-
grated with Rolemaster Spell Law, three new distinctgrated with Rolemaster Spell Law, three new distinct
alchemist professions can utilise their spells to createalchemist professions can utilise their spells to create
magical marvels.magical marvels.
Adepts are the unrivalled Essence masters of fashion-Adepts are the unrivalled Essence masters of fashion-
ing enchanted arms and armor as well as bladerunesing enchanted arms and armor as well as bladerunes
and Constructs. Psychographers are the consummateand Constructs. Psychographers are the consummate
Mentalism masters of empowering items with skill,Mentalism masters of empowering items with skill,
talents and powers from themselves and others, andtalents and powers from themselves and others, and
the creators of magical clones and abominable mon-the creators of magical clones and abominable mon-
strosities. Sanctifiers channel the power of their god tostrosities. Sanctifiers channel the power of their god to
dedicate items with powers aligned to their religion, todedicate items with powers aligned to their religion, to
shape Golems and to consecrate shrines and the veryshape Golems and to consecrate shrines and the very
land itself. Each profession can choose from at leastland itself. Each profession can choose from at least
ten spell lists, allowing for both versatile and specialistten spell lists, allowing for both versatile and specialist
enchanters. Each spell list contains a complete set ofenchanters. Each spell list contains a complete set of
spells from 1st to 20th level, plus epic 25th, 30th, 35th,spells from 1st to 20th level, plus epic 25th, 30th, 35th,
40th, 50th, 60th, 75th, and 90th magics, enabling the40th, 50th, 60th, 75th, and 90th magics, enabling the
creation of artifacts of legendary puissance.creation of artifacts of legendary puissance.
Over two hundred items are fully detailed for use bothOver two hundred items are fully detailed for use both
as treasure and as practical examples. Production costsas treasure and as practical examples. Production costs
and spell failure results are included for player-charac-and spell failure results are included for player-charac-
ter alchemists while typical market prices are includedter alchemists while typical market prices are included
for those more concerned with magical commerce.for those more concerned with magical commerce.
In addition, Treasure Law offers extended equipmentIn addition, Treasure Law offers extended equipment
lists, magical herbs and poisons, and gems includinglists, magical herbs and poisons, and gems including
their physical and magical properties. Random treasuretheir physical and magical properties. Random treasure
tables are provided for the gamemaster, including vari-tables are provided for the gamemaster, including vari-
ous forms of wealth, superior non-magical equipment,ous forms of wealth, superior non-magical equipment,
and magic items suitable for any level of play. A chapterand magic items suitable for any level of play. A chapter
on economics discusses worldbuilding considerationson economics discusses worldbuilding considerations
as well as the mechanics of buying and selling goods.as well as the mechanics of buying and selling goods.
